title: Verifying Hardware Conveyor Trigger / Vision Trigger
description:
Verifying Hardware Conveyor Trigger / Vision Trigger

Verifying Hardware Conveyor Trigger / Vision Trigger

Verifying the Hardware Conveyor Trigger

Move
	 the conveyor and stop it.

Check
	 the encoder pulse. Enter the following to the command window.

	> Print Cnv_Pulse
	 (Conveyor number)

Turn
	 ON the I/O output number which the trigger is wired to. Latch the
	 encoder pulse.

Check
	 the latch pulse. Enter the following to the command window.

	> Print Cnv_LPulse
	 (Conveyor number)

- If the same value as obtained in the Step 2 is latched, the verification is completed.

- If not, check the hardware conveyor trigger wiring.

Verifying the Vision Trigger

Set
	 the RuntimeAcquire property of the vision sequence to "Strobed" and
	 the TriggerMode property to "Leading".

Execute
	 the vision sequence and put it into the trigger waiting state.

Turn
	 ON the I/O output number which the trigger is wired to and release
	 the shutter.

- If the captured image is displayed on the VisionGuide window, the verification is completed.

- If not, check the vision trigger wiring.
